# Cometstrike Dirk
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cometstrike%20Dirk&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Cometstrike Dirk
| desc = A dagger forged from the body of a dwarf star, imbued with the energy of a thousand comets.
| tier = GL
| slot = dagger

| minDmg = 115
| maxDmg = 195
| shots = 1
| rof = 100
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 14
| lifetime = 420
| fameb = 6

| soulbound = Yes.

| lootbag = red
| dropsFrom = can be found in Red Bags.
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
[[Category: Daggers]]
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]
</noinclude>
